ddls:
CREATE TABLE "weeks" (
  "week_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each week */,
  "week_number" INTEGER /* Week number in the curriculum */,
  "topics" TEXT /* Topics covered during the week */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the week */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the week */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("week_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "topics" (
  "topic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each topic */,
  "topic_name" TEXT /* Name of the topic */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the topic */,
  "estimated_duration" TEXT /* Estimated duration to cover the topic */,
  "difficulty_level" TEXT /* Difficulty level of the topic */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("topic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "readings_materials" (
  "material_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each material */,
  "week_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the week the material is associated with */,
  "material_name" TEXT /* Name of the material */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the material */,
  "material_type" TEXT /* Type of the material */,
  "is_mandatory" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the material is mandatory */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("material_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_readings_materials_week_id FOREIGN KEY ("week_id") REFERENCES weeks ("week_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weekly_learning_outcomes" (
  "outcome_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each learning outcome */,
  "week_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the week the outcome is associated with */,
  "outcome_description" TEXT /* Description of the learning outcome */,
  "assessment_type" TEXT /* Type of assessment */,
  "weightage" REAL /* Weightage of the learning outcome */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("outcome_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weekly_learning_outcomes_week_id FOREIGN KEY ("week_id") REFERENCES weeks ("week_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instructional_strategies" (
  "strategy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instructional strategy */,
  "week_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the week the strategy is used */,
  "strategy_name" TEXT /* Name of the instructional strategy */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the instructional strategy */,
  "estimated_time" TEXT /* Estimated time required */,
  "resources_needed" TEXT /* Resources needed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("strategy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_instructional_strategies_week_id FOREIGN KEY ("week_id") REFERENCES weeks ("week_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "evaluations" (
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each evaluation */,
  "week_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the week the evaluation is associated with */,
  "evaluation_name" TEXT /* Name of the evaluation */,
  "evaluation_date" TEXT /* Date of the evaluation */,
  "evaluation_type" TEXT /* Type of evaluation */,
  "total_points" INTEGER /* Total points possible */,
  "passing_points" INTEGER /* Passing points required */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("evaluation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluations_week_id FOREIGN KEY ("week_id") REFERENCES weeks ("week_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tools" (
  "tool_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tool */,
  "tool_name" TEXT /* Name of the tool */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the tool */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the tool */,
  "installation_link" TEXT /* Link for downloading or installing the tool */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tool_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "student_name" TEXT /* Full name of the student */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the student */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date the student enrolled */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the student */,
  "interest_areas" TEXT /* Areas of interest of the student */,
  "portfolio_link" TEXT /* Link to the student's portfolio */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "student_evaluations" (
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the evaluation */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the student */,
  "score" REAL /* Score achieved by the student */,
  "feedback" TEXT /* Feedback provided to the student */,
  "instructor_comments" TEXT /* Additional comments from the instructor */,
  "is_revised" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the evaluation has been revised */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("evaluation_id", "student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instructors" (
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instructor */,
  "instructor_name" TEXT /* Full name of the instructor */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the instructor */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the instructor belongs to */,
  "expertise_areas" TEXT /* Areas of expertise of the instructor */,
  "office_hours" TEXT /* Office hours of the instructor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instructor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_resources" (
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each resource */,
  "week_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the week the resource is associated with */,
  "resource_name" TEXT /* Name of the resource */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the resource */,
  "resource_type" TEXT /* Type of the resource */,
  "is_mandatory" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the resource is mandatory */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("resource_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "student_resources" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the student */,
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the resource */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the resource was accessed */,
  "is_completed" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the resource has been completed */,
  "completion_date" TEXT /* Date when the resource was completed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_resources_resource_id FOREIGN KEY ("resource_id") REFERENCES course_resources ("resource_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_resources_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each piece of feedback */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the student */,
  "week_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the week the feedback is for */,
  "feedback_text" TEXT /* Text of the feedback provided */,
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the instructor */,
  "feedback_rating" INTEGER /* Numerical rating for the feedback */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_feedback_instructor_id FOREIGN KEY ("instructor_id") REFERENCES instructors ("instructor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_feedback_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_feedback_week_id FOREIGN KEY ("week_id") REFERENCES weeks ("week_id")
)
